protein_name: Major high molecular weight protein of desmosomes. Involved in the organization of the desmosomal cadherin-plakoglobin complexes into discrete plasma membrane domains and in the anchoring of intermediate filaments to the desmosomes. Belongs to the plakin or cytolinker family. Isoform DPI is apparently an obligate constituent of all desmosomes. Isoform DPII resides predominantly in tissues and cells of stratified origin. 3 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
